ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings or spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents or children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid for the ticket */,
  "cabin" TEXT /* Cabin number */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket class */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "travel_companion" TEXT /* Name of travel companion */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any known medical conditions */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "passport_number" TEXT /* Passport number for verification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES ticket_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Departure port of the voyage */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Arrival port of the voyage */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the voyage */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the voyage in days */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "captain_name" TEXT /* Name of the captain */,
  "crew_count" INTEGER /* Number of crew members */,
  "passenger_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the voyage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survivals" (
  "survival_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (1 if survived, 0 if not) */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage associated with the passenger */,
  "rescue_team" TEXT /* Name of the rescue team */,
  "rescue_time" TEXT /* Time of rescue */,
  "injuries" TEXT /* Description of any injuries sustained */,
  "survival_cause" TEXT /* Cause of survival */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survivals_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survivals_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger data accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket class (e.g., First, Second, Third) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range for the class */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Description of amenities included */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers per class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)
